sentences.translation: Lejla je nazvala svoju prijateljicu Merjem.
sentences.translationEn: Layla called her friend Maryam on the phone.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْهَا إِذَا كَانَتْ مَشْغُولَةً أَمْ لَا.
sentences.translation: Pitala je je li zauzeta ili ne.
sentences.translationEn: She asked her if she was busy or not.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَتْهَا عَنِ الحَفْلَةِ فِي نِهَايَةِ الأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Obavijestila je o zabavi za vikend.
sentences.translationEn: She told her about the party at the weekend.

sentences.translation: Merjem je pristala i rekla da će doći.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam agreed and said she would come.
